creator: ml@netfence.it
text:
(In reply to Dutchman01 from comment #32)

I applied the patches to 4.13 and I've been running them for a almost a week in several sites without problems.
You can find them here:
https://www.netfence.it/sub/sambaonfreebsd/

I know this should be a different bug, but I'd like others to test them, before submission.
If you are daring enough... :)
